scenes.title: The Bakery Shelf
scenes.background_prompt: A bakery display case with glass shelves, a marble countertop, a chalkboard menu on the wall, and warm golden lighting. No people, no food items on the main shelf.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bakery with warm golden lighting. Behind a glass display case, three identical pink-frosted cupcakes sit in a row on the middle shelf, each in a white paper liner with a small sugar flower on top. The left cupcake's flower is slightly tilted, the center one sits perfectly upright, and the right one has a tiny bite-sized crumb fallen beside it on the shelf. A baker with a flour-dusted apron and a warm smile stands behind the marble counter, holding a pair of tongs. The chalkboard menu on the wall behind lists items in colorful chalk. Other pastries — croissants, muffins, and cookies — fill the other shelves of the display case.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place cupcake_1 on the middle shelf (left), with sugar flower slightly tilted. Place cupcake_2 on the shelf (center), sitting perfectly upright. Place cupcake_3 on the shelf (right), with a tiny crumb fallen beside it. Place baker behind the marble counter, standing and holding tongs, smiling.
